subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の人差し指を小指の輪の中に上から入れ、人差し指の向こうの糸と小指の手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the "Opening A". Insert both index fingers from above into the little-finger loops, and pick up the far index strings and the near little-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 両方の小指の糸を静かに外し、外した糸を親指で下から取ります
subtitle.en: Quietly release both little-finger strings, and with the thumbs pick them up again from below.

subtitle.ja: 先ほど取った両手の親指の上の糸は残したまま、親指同士を繋いでいる下の糸だけを外します
subtitle.en: Keep the upper strings that were just taken on both thumbs, and release only the lower string that runs between the thumbs.

subtitle.ja: 左手親指と右手人差し指を繋いでいる糸を、左手小指で下から掴んで手のひらに引き付けます
subtitle.en: With the left little finger, pick up from below the string that runs between the left thumb and the right index finger, and draw it toward the palm.

subtitle.ja: 親指同士を繋いでいる向こう側の糸を、右手小指で下から掴んで手のひらに引きつけます
subtitle.en: With the left little finger, grasp the string that runs between the left thumb and the right index finger and draw it toward the palm.

subtitle.ja: 両手の人差し指の糸を全て外し、指先を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Release all index strings and turn the fingertips away to complete the figure.
